common.dashboard_desc: Manage and interact with your AI personas. Each character is a unique synthesis of logic and aesthetic.
common.forge_desc: Initialize a new algorithmic soul from the studio templates.
common.clear_history_desc: Remove all messages but keep your characters.
common.factory_reset_desc: Wipe all data and restore default characters.
common.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history? This cannot be undone.
common.confirm_reset: CRITICAL: This will delete ALL characters, settings, and history. Are you absolutely sure?
common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this persona?
common.avatar_desc: * You can paste a link to an image or upload a file from your device.
common.sync_desc: * All characters will use this global AI configuration for synchronization.
